texts.full_text: TV series, 11, ZERO, SAGA, SIN DOB: December 24, 1983 Height: 5'7" (170 cm) Weight: 66 kg (145 lbs) Hayato Kazami is the protagonist of the Future GPX Cyber Formula series. He starts his racing career at a young age and quickly becomes one of the most drivers in the world, known for pushing himself to the limit both on and off the track. His determination often puts him into conflict with other characters but also makes him highly respected among fans and fellow racers alike. Bleed Kaga Voice actor: Hirohiko Kakegawa/Ken Narita Anime TV series, SAGA, ZERO, AXS, Next,
